sql: SELECT IndexId, ConfigType, ConfigVersion, Address, Port, Ports, Id, AlterId, Security, Network, Remarks, HeaderType, RequestHost, Path, StreamSecurity, AllowInsecure, Subid, IsSub, Flow, Sni, Alpn, CoreType, PreSocksPort, Fingerprint, DisplayLog, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, Mldsa65Verify, Extra, MuxEnabled, Cert from (select *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IndexId) AS linenum from ProfileItem where Subid not in  ('5544178410297751350','5126987642659995691')) where linenum between 1 and 10000;
